name: hg-services-launch-tracker
description: Frontend and password-protected backend for the HG Services June launch tracker.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check lib/vercel-adapter.mjs && node --check lib/vercel-auth.mjs && node --check api/admin.mjs && node --check api/login.mjs && node --check api/logout.mjs && node --check api/sheet/push.mjs && node --check api/sheet/pull.mjs
